patches.hypothesis: The refined fix will address overfitting by ensuring that the method correctly identifies and processes XML declarations regardless of the type of the first child node. It will add checks to handle cases where the first child node is not an Element, and will properly handle null values and edge cases.
patches.original_hypothesis: The bug occurs because the method assumes that the parsed document will always have at least one child node, which is not the case when parsing a script tag with embedded XML declaration-like strings. The fix involves checking if the document has any child nodes before attempting to access the first child.
